notes: User always handles login and Gmail 6-digit OTP manually.
After filling start/end/break, click the Description field to trigger hour recalculation before OK.
On the period screen: select contract assignment, select current week period, click Next.
On the week grid: click Edit for each day, fill row, click OK.
Click Save on the week grid but never Submit for Approval unless user explicitly asks.
Skip days with no work (public holidays, leave) — leave at 0 or clear via Edit with 00:00 times.
Element refs change each snapshot; find fields by accessibility name (startTime, endTime, nonWorkedTime).
